commonProblems.h2: Toyota Aygo Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Toyota Aygo's 1.0L 1KR-FE petrol engine is generally reliable, but head gasket failure (particularly 2014-2018 models) and water pump issues drive most replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: Head Gasket Failure - Why 2014-2018 Aygo 1KR-FE Engines Fail
problems.affectedModels: Toyota Aygo 1.0 VVT-i (2014-2018, 1KR-FE), Aygo X-Play, Aygo X-Clusive, Aygo X-Pression
problems.rootCause: Manufacturing tolerance issues in cylinder head gasket sealing combined with thermal cycling stress, leading to coolant/oil mixing and compression loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder head, replace gasket, reseal, reassemble
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if caught early before block damage; 30-50k mile solution

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit fully rebuilt 1KR-FE with upgraded gasket, bench tested, warranty included
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for cars worth £500-£1,500; 50k+ mile solution with warranty

problems.recommendation: On a Toyota Aygo worth £500-£1,500, a full rebuilt engine replacement often offers better long-term value than a head gasket repair, especially if the car has exceeded 70k miles. We recommend comparing quotes before committing.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 1KR-FE engine prices for your Toyota Aygo

problems.h4: Water Pump Failure - Coolant Loss Leading to Overheating
problems.rootCause: Water pump bearing/seal wear allowing coolant leakage, often exacerbated by infrequent coolant changes and thermal stress in stop-start city driving.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Drain coolant, replace water pump and gasket, refill system
repairOptions.longevity: Preventative fix if caught before overheating damage occurs

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine if overheating caused internal damage
repairOptions.longevity: Required if head warping or seizure occurred; includes warranty

problems.recommendation: If your Aygo is losing coolant but hasn't overheated, a water pump replacement is cost-effective. If the temperature gauge has spiked, get a compression test first - internal damage may require a full replacement.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Toyota Aygo water pump repair or engine replacement

problems.h4: Cooling System Leak - Radiator, Hoses & Thermostat Failures
problems.rootCause: Age-related degradation of plastic radiator end tanks, rubber hose perishing, or thermostat housing cracks allowing coolant escape and subsequent overheating risk.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty radiator/hose/thermostat, pressure test system
repairOptions.longevity: Cost-effective preventative maintenance; extends engine life

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Required only if leak caused severe overheating damage
repairOptions.longevity: Best option if engine has seized or head is warped

problems.recommendation: Regular coolant system inspections every 2 years can prevent costly failures. If your Aygo has overheated, don't risk a cheap repair - get a specialist assessment first.
problems.cta: Compare Toyota Aygo cooling system repair vs engine replacement costs

problems.rootCause: MMT clutch actuator or sensor failure causing juddering, poor gear changes, or limp mode - often misdiagnosed as engine problems by owners.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty actuator/sensor, recalibrate system, road test
repairOptions.longevity: Resolves transmission issues without engine work if diagnosis is correct

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 1KR-FE verified MMT-compatible, includes system check
repairOptions.longevity: Only needed if engine damage occurred alongside transmission fault

problems.recommendation: Get a proper MMT diagnostic before assuming engine failure. Many "Aygo engine problems" are actually transmission actuator faults that cost far less to fix.
problems.cta: Get MMT-compatible Toyota Aygo engine quotes with transmission check

problems.rootCause: Timing chain tensioner wear allowing chain slack, causing rattling noise on cold start and potential valve timing issues if ignored.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace chain, tensioner, guides; reset timing; test run
repairOptions.longevity: Preventative fix if caught before valve damage; 40k+ mile solution

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Required if chain jump caused valve/piston contact damage
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if internal damage confirmed; includes warranty

problems.recommendation: A cold-start rattle on your Aygo's 1KR-FE should be investigated promptly. If caught early, a chain kit replacement is cost-effective; if ignored, replacement becomes necessary.
problems.cta: Compare timing chain repair vs rebuilt engine costs for your Aygo

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Toyota Aygo
finalCta.paragraph: The Toyota Aygo's low purchase price makes engine replacement decisions critical. EngineMarket connects you with UK specialists offering rebuilt, reconditioned and used engines at transparent prices - all with minimum 12-month warranty coverage. Compare quotes in minutes and keep your city car on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Toyota Aygo Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Toyota Aygo and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Toyota Aygo Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Toyota Aygo is listed below with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the correct replacement.

items.title: Toyota Aygo 1.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.0-litre three-cylinder petrol engine powered every Aygo generation, from the original AB10 (2005) through to the Aygo X (2024). Its compact design, VVT-i technology and exceptional fuel economy made it the definitive city car powerplant, though head gasket issues on 2014-2018 models require attention when sourcing replacements.
items.cta: Compare Toyota Aygo 1.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Toyota Aygo 1.4L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.4-litre DV4-TD diesel was offered only on early Aygo models (2005-2007), sharing its design with Peugeot/Citroën HDi units. While offering strong low-end torque and excellent fuel economy, production ceased due to emissions regulations, making used replacements increasingly scarce but still sought by high-mileage urban drivers. Not sure which engine size your Toyota Aygo needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. All engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Toyota Aygo specialists.

engineYears.h2: Toyota Aygo Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Toyota Aygo's production run, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The Aygo launched with two engine options: the ubiquitous 1.0L 1KR-FE petrol and the short-lived 1.4L DV4-TD diesel, both shared with the Peugeot 107/Citroën C1 platform.
keyChanges: Toyota Aygo introduced alongside Peugeot 107 and Citroën C1 on shared B1 platform
1KR-FE petrol and DV4-TD diesel engines confirmed for UK market
MMT automated manual transmission option announced for later rollout
knownFor: Strong initial reliability on early 1KR-FE units
Diesel option popular with high-mileage urban drivers
Cross-brand parts compatibility simplifies sourcing
years.cta: Get quotes for 2005-2007 Toyota Aygo replacement engines
years.ticker: Toyota Aygo 1.0 engine replacement • Aygo 1.4 HDi engine for sale • 1KR-FE used engine UK

years.description: Minor updates refreshed the Aygo's styling and equipment, while the proven 1KR-FE petrol engine continued unchanged, building a reputation for affordability and simplicity.
keyChanges: Exterior styling refresh with new bumper and light designs
Interior trim upgrades and expanded equipment levels
MMT transmission option rolled out across select trims
knownFor: 1KR-FE reliability solidifying as a city car benchmark
MMT transmission introducing new compatibility considerations
Growing breaker network supporting affordable used engine supply

years.description: The all-new AB40-generation Aygo retained the familiar 1.0L 1KR-FE engine but with revised mounting and ancillaries, requiring year-specific compatibility checks for replacements.
keyChanges: New AB40 platform with revised chassis and body structure
1KR-FE engine updated with revised mounts and ancillary layout
Enhanced safety equipment and interior refinement
knownFor: Engine compatibility nuances between AB10 and AB40 generations
Continued strong demand for affordable 1KR-FE replacements
Growing awareness of head gasket issues on higher-mileage units
years.cta: Get quotes for 2012-2014 Toyota Aygo replacement engines
years.ticker: Aygo AB40 engine replacement • 1KR-FE AB10 vs AB40 compatibility • Aygo 2012 engine for sale

years.description: A significant facelift brought styling and equipment updates, but also marked the emergence of head gasket failures on 1KR-FE engines built during this period, driving replacement demand.
keyChanges: Major exterior and interior refresh with new front-end design
1KR-FE production batch with known head gasket tolerance issues (2014-2018)
Expanded trim range including Black Edition and Blue Edition
knownFor: Head gasket failures emerging as the dominant Aygo engine problem
Strong aftermarket support for affordable rebuilt 1KR-FE units
Cross-brand compatibility with Peugeot 108/Citroën C1 critical for sourcing
years.cta: Compare rebuilt 1KR-FE engine prices for your Aygo
years.ticker: Aygo head gasket failure 2014-2018 • 1KR-FE rebuilt engine price • Aygo engine cost vs car value
enquiries: Aygo engine cost vs car value

years.description: The introduction of the Euro 6-compliant 1KR-B52 engine alongside the updated 1KR-FE marked a technical evolution, with improved emissions control and refined performance for the Aygo's final hatchback years.
keyChanges: 1KR-B52 engine introduced for Euro 6 compliance on select trims
Revised emissions systems and engine management calibration
Final hatchback Aygo production before Aygo X transition
knownFor: 1KR-B52 offering improved low-end torque and emissions performance
Early 1KR-B52 units (2018-2019) showing minor cooling system leaks
Continued strong demand for affordable 1KR-FE replacements on older models
years.cta: Get quotes for 2018-2021 Toyota Aygo replacement engines

years.description: The crossover-styled Aygo X retained the proven 1KR-B52 engine but with revised packaging for the new body style, representing the current generation for replacement sourcing.
keyChanges: Aygo X introduced with crossover styling and raised ride height
1KR-B52 engine standard across all trims with revised ancillary layout
Updated infotainment and safety equipment as standard
knownFor: 1KR-B52 reliability improving as early teething issues resolved
Growing replacement demand as first Aygo X units reach higher mileage
Continued cross-brand compatibility considerations for sourcing flexibility

faq.h2: Toyota Aygo Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: Is the Toyota Aygo engine the same as Peugeot 108 or Citroën C1?
items.answer: Yes, the Aygo's 1.0L 1KR-FE and 1.4L DV4-TD engines are shared with the Peugeot 108 and Citroën C1 due to their joint development on the B1 platform. This compatibility significantly expands your options when sourcing used or rebuilt engines from UK breakers.
keyPoints: 1KR-FE petrol engine fits all three models interchangeably
DV4-TD diesel shared across Aygo, 108 and C1 (2005-2007)
Always verify engine code and mounting points before purchase
items.cta: Compare cross-brand compatible Aygo engine prices

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Toyota Aygo engine in the UK?
items.answer: A rebuilt Toyota Aygo 1KR-FE engine typically costs £650-£1,100 supply-only, while fitted prices range from £950-£1,700 depending on garage rates and location. Used engines start from £350 but carry shorter warranties and variable condition.
keyPoints: Rebuilt 1KR-FE: £650-£1,100 supply-only
Fitted replacement: £950-£1,700 all-in typical
Used engines from £350 with 30-90 day warranty
items.cta: Get tailored Toyota Aygo engine replacement quotes

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine on a Toyota Aygo?
items.answer: For Aygos valued at £500-£1,500, a rebuilt engine costing £650-£1,100 can extend the car's life by 50k+ miles, often representing better value than purchasing another used vehicle with unknown history.
keyPoints: Aygo market value typically £500-£1,500
Rebuilt engine adds 50k+ reliable miles with warranty
Compare total cost against alternative vehicle purchase
items.cta: Calculate if Aygo engine replacement makes financial sense

items.question: What causes head gasket failure on the Toyota Aygo 1KR-FE?
items.answer: Head gasket failures on 2014-2018 Aygo 1KR-FE engines stem from manufacturing tolerance issues combined with thermal cycling stress, leading to coolant/oil mixing and compression loss, particularly between 60k-90k miles.
keyPoints: Tolerance issues in 2014-2018 production batch
Failure typically occurs 60k-90k miles
Upgraded gaskets in rebuilt units address root cause
items.cta: Get quotes for upgraded 1KR-FE rebuilt engines

items.question: How long does a Toyota Aygo 1KR-FE engine last?
items.answer: With proper maintenance, the 1KR-FE can reliably exceed 150,000 miles, though head gasket and water pump issues on certain production batches may require attention between 60k-90k miles to reach that potential.
keyPoints: Potential lifespan 150,000+ miles with maintenance
Head gasket risk on 2014-2018 units at 60k-90k miles
Regular coolant changes critical for longevity

items.question: Can I fit a Toyota Aygo engine myself?
items.answer: While the Aygo's compact 1.0L engine is relatively accessible, engine replacement requires specialist tools, lifting equipment and technical expertise - we recommend using EngineMarket's vetted supply & fit network for warranty-backed results.
keyPoints: Engine removal requires hoist and specialist tools
Torque specifications and timing critical for reliability
Supply & fit packages include warranty on workmanship
items.cta: Find Toyota Aygo engine supply & fit deals near you

items.question: Do you supply and fit Toyota Aygo engines with warranty?
items.answer: Yes, EngineMarket's network offers supply & fit packages for Toyota Aygo engines, combining rebuilt/reconditioned units with professional installation and a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering both parts and labour.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month warranty on parts and labour
Nationwide network of vetted independent garages
Transparent all-in pricing before you commit
items.cta: Compare fitted Toyota Aygo engine prices with warranty

items.question: What is the cheapest Toyota Aygo replacement engine option?
items.answer: Used 1KR-FE engines from UK breakers start from £350 supply-only, offering the lowest upfront cost for Aygo owners prioritising budget, though with shorter warranties and variable condition compared to rebuilt units.
keyPoints: Used engines from £350 supply-only
Typical warranty 30-90 days on used units
Rebuilt units from £650 offer longer warranty and reliability
items.cta: Compare used vs rebuilt Aygo engine costs

items.question: What causes a Toyota Aygo engine to lose power?
items.answer: Power loss on Aygo 1KR-FE engines commonly stems from EGR valve clogging, fuel injector issues, or ignition coil failures - all diagnosable with an OBD2 scanner and often repairable without full engine replacement.
keyPoints: EGR valve clogging common on high-mileage units
Ignition coil or injector faults trigger limp mode
Diagnostic scan recommended before considering replacement
items.cta: Get diagnostic quotes before committing to Aygo engine replacement

items.answer: EngineMarket connects you with UK specialists offering reconditioned Toyota Aygo 1KR-FE engines from £650, all with minimum 12-month warranty, compression test reports and nationwide delivery options.
keyPoints: Reconditioned 1KR-FE from £650 supply-only
Compression test reports provided with each unit
Nationwide delivery and supply & fit options available
